requirement: Final benchmark should contain 20-50 accepted tasks after QA and filtering.
source_note: Playbook project target and user benchmark-size requirement.

requirement: Accepted tasks should preserve a dev/test split.
source_note: Playbook split and difficulty design requirement.

requirement: Task families should be mixed and not mostly direct theorem proving.
source_note: Playbook recommended task portfolio requirement.

requirement: Accepted tasks should span increasing human-time horizons, not only T0/T1/T2 calibration.
source_note: Playbook time-horizon design and user long-horizon objective.

requirement: Each release task should include public prompt and public Lean scaffold files.
source_note: Playbook prompt and public-asset standards.

requirement: Each release task should have hidden reference proof and hidden semantic PinCheck.
source_note: Playbook Lean grader architecture and hidden semantic pins sections.

requirement: Accepted tasks should include plausible wrong submissions that fail for meaningful reasons.
source_note: User QA requirement and playbook local validation loop.

requirement: Scoring should use Lean wherever possible and provide validation commands.
source_note: Playbook Lean grader architecture.

requirement: Submissions should be scanned for forbidden constructs before Lean grading.
source_note: Playbook integrity and reward-hack hardening.

requirement: Axiom usage should be audited or governed by a documented policy.
source_note: Playbook axiom audit guidance.

requirement: Task metadata should include family, domain, human-time, skills, scaffold sensitivity, and failure modes.
source_note: Playbook task metadata schema.

requirement: Task metadata, run results, failure labels, and failure-label reviews should have schemas.
source_note: User data-schema requirement.

requirement: Data schema manifest should validate schema-backed datasets and document generated CSV schema boundaries.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for data-dictionary and schema-boundary transparency.

requirement: run_results should represent successes_out_of_k and pass@k consistently.
source_note: User pass@k semantics requirement.

requirement: The repo should support one-shot, lookup, and lookup plus iterative compile/debug scaffold variants.
source_note: Playbook scaffold ladder.

requirement: Lookup scaffold must not expose hidden references or wrong submissions.
source_note: Playbook hidden-material non-leak and scaffold lookup requirements.

requirement: A prospective evaluation protocol should define the primary accepted-task scaffold sweep before broad model runs.
source_note: Report-quality requirement derived from playbook calibration outputs.

requirement: Committed provider rows should be analyzed separately from local QA and against the planned primary sweep.
source_note: Report-quality requirement for not overstating smoke rows.

requirement: Model evidence provenance audit should verify sample sizes model versions k values transcripts infra accounting and local-QA exclusion in report text and committed data.
source_note: Playbook final-report requirement that report text states sample sizes and model versions.

requirement: The report should compare real model performance across scaffolds, ideally pass@10.
source_note: Playbook scaffold interpretation and calibration outputs.

requirement: Run rows should link transcripts and carry failure labels for review.
source_note: Playbook failure taxonomy.

requirement: Transcript review packet should provide a non-local run review queue failure-label codebook blank adjudication template and label-claim boundary without fabricating review labels.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for transcript-based failure classification.

requirement: Failure-label review audit should verify committed non-local transcript reviews against transcripts and keep smoke-label claims caveated.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for evidence-backed transcript failure classification.

requirement: Frontier/open-model runs should provide evidence beyond local QA.
source_note: Playbook project target.

requirement: Public export should include public assets and exclude hidden references and wrong submissions.
source_note: User hidden-material non-leak requirement.

requirement: Task asset manifest should record per-task public hidden and wrong asset hashes plus public-export mapping.
source_note: Research-report reproducibility requirement for exact task assets.

requirement: The METR-style report and plots should regenerate from committed CSVs.
source_note: Playbook report shape and user reporting requirement.

requirement: Figure manifest should map generated SVGs to source CSVs allowed interpretations and blocked performance-plot overclaims.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for plot provenance and anti-overclaim boundaries.

requirement: Main report should stay skimmable while row-level generated evidence lives in a dedicated appendix.
source_note: Playbook guidance to avoid overloading the main report with platform metadata and long generated tables.

requirement: Report source-traceability audit should map main-report sections to committed CSV report script and export evidence and check section-level boundary phrases.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for claim-to-source traceability.

requirement: Regeneration command consistency audit should verify that README validation commands manifest source commands committed manifest commands and reviewer local-replay commands stay synchronized.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for reproducible reviewer instructions.

requirement: Concise METR-style report should provide a skimmable reviewer-facing narrative while detailed generated tables remain in appendices and CSVs.
source_note: Playbook report-shape guidance to keep the main text skimmable.

requirement: Report-shape audit should check the concise METR-style report against the playbook questions and distinguish answered limitations from unsupported performance claims.
source_note: Playbook report-shape guidance for METR-style narrative completeness.

requirement: Report count-consistency audit should verify that repeated top-line counts in reports and manifests agree with committed CSV and JSON sources.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for numerical claim consistency across generated report layers.

requirement: Difficulty audit should include proof length, tactic profile, automation dominance, hidden-pin strength, and model-solvability estimates.
source_note: User hard-review requirement.

requirement: Accepted tasks should have hard reviewer-style notes and benchmark-grade caveats.
source_note: User accepted-task review requirement.

requirement: Reviewer-facing task quality matrix should join metadata, difficulty signals, caveats, and next-review actions.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for task-level auditability.

requirement: Accepted-task cards should synthesize each accepted_v0 row's review status proof signals pin coverage local QA evidence asset counts and benchmark-grade blockers.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for per-task reviewer usability.

requirement: Diagnostic coverage audit should map accepted tasks to playbook capabilities families failure labels and construct-validity gaps.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for diagnostic validity.

requirement: Construct-validity matrix should trace each accepted task to claimed capabilities evidence singleton limits and task-level claim boundaries.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for claim-to-task construct validity.

requirement: Human-time calibration audit should verify bucket and p50/p90 consistency and explicitly track missing independent timing evidence.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for time-horizon estimate validity.

requirement: Human timing collection packet should give independent reviewers per-task timing instructions validation commands and a blank observation template without containing fabricated observations.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for making independent timing collection operational.

requirement: Independent accepted-task review packet should provide non-author review instructions per-task plan blank template and schema without fabricating observations.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for independent non-author task-quality review collection.

requirement: Independent task-review status audit should distinguish packet readiness from missing completed non-author reviews.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for separating review workflow readiness from completed independent review evidence.

requirement: Hidden-pin audit should distinguish public-stage wrong failures from wrong submissions that reach semantic pins.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for semantic-check evidence.

requirement: Run-result integrity audit should verify transcripts, score vectors, failure labels, and pass@k arithmetic.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for run-data validity.

requirement: Grader hardening audit should probe forbidden scanning false-positive controls task-specific bans grader stage ordering axiom allowlists validation-command coverage and local QA outcomes.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for anti-gaming evidence.

requirement: Statistical reporting audit should determine which recommended performance plots and claims are supported by committed provider sample sizes.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for not overinterpreting smoke rows.

requirement: Statistical analysis plan should define claim-tier evidence thresholds and Wilson precision limits before broad model runs.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for preregistered analysis and precision boundaries.

requirement: Provider readiness audit should verify model-runner contracts adapter coverage credential policy transcript evidence planned sweep commands and smoke-only coverage limits.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for provider-run transparency.

requirement: Model sweep execution packet should provide concrete provider scaffold commands credential policy post-run evidence checks and claim-boundary reminders without creating fake model results.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for making planned scaffold/provider sweeps operational.

requirement: Hosted QA readiness audit should distinguish local readiness from missing Taiga packaging problem-version QA and finding-resolution evidence.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for hosted-QA transparency.

requirement: Threats-to-validity register should turn construct internal external statistical operational and security limitations into generated evidence rows with mitigations and stronger-evidence requirements.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for explicit validity limitations.

requirement: Threat coverage audit should verify that open locked-benchmark blockers and non-allowed claims are represented in threats-to-validity rows with mitigations and stronger-evidence requirements.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for blocker-to-threat traceability.

requirement: Claim-evidence audit should map artifact, report, performance, and benchmark-status claims to evidence strength and limits.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for avoiding overclaims.

requirement: Claim authorization matrix should translate evidence audits into allowed caveated and blocked report wording, including forbidden overclaim language.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for reviewer-readable claim boundaries.

requirement: Research claim gap matrix should map caveated and blocked claims to the minimum evidence packages and requirement gates needed before stronger wording is allowed.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for upgrade-path traceability.

requirement: Report claim-conformance audit should check the main report and README against the claim authorization matrix so blocked claims remain caveated or explicitly unsupported.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for enforcing claim boundaries in prose.

requirement: Release decision log should translate evidence audits into explicit pass/caution/block gates and next actions.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for reviewable go/no-go claims.

requirement: Freeze-readiness roadmap should synthesize requirement claim hosted QA statistical model-run and metadata audits into measurable gates for locked-benchmark readiness.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for concrete next-step gating.

requirement: Scaffold support audit should verify prompt contracts runner semantics lookup safety planned coverage and observed coverage limits.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for scaffold-ladder validity.

requirement: Prompt contract audit should check release prompts for edit scope theorem/import policy helper-lemma policy forbidden constructs submission format tool affordance and hidden-material leaks.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for public prompt validity.

requirement: Human-time estimates should be separately reviewed or measured, not inferred from model pass rates.
source_note: Playbook human time estimates process.

requirement: Accepted task-quality claims should receive completed independent non-author task review before benchmark freeze.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for independent accepted-task review before stronger benchmark-grade claims.

requirement: Hosted Taiga/Env Linter QA should be run before delivery/freeze.
source_note: Playbook hosted QA loop.

requirement: A clean regeneration trail should record toolchain, commands, counts, and artifact hashes.
source_note: Report-quality reproducibility requirement.

requirement: Validation manifest audit should verify manifest schema command coverage artifact hashes public-export summary and dirty-status policy.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for reproducibility evidence boundaries.

requirement: Reviewer reproduction packet should give an ordered local replay workflow external-evidence boundaries expected artifacts and failure interpretations.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for outside-reviewer reproducibility.

requirement: Clean workspace replay should exercise dependency materialization Lean build grader pass/fail behavior and public export validation outside the dirty working directory.
source_note: Research-report quality requirement for bounded clean-workspace reproducibility.

requirement: Candidate tasks should be separated from accepted tasks and pruned aggressively.
source_note: Playbook candidate generation and filtering guidance.

requirement: Formalization tasks should use semantic pins rather than brittle exact-text matching.
source_note: Playbook hidden semantic pins guidance.
